author: Eren Kahveci
name: Use-Theoretic Embeddings: A Wittgensteinian Test of the Static-Embedding Orthodoxy
blurb: Replaces the V x d_model static tied embedding (4.2M params, the largest single line item in a 16 MB Parameter Golf model) with a V x d_seed=64 seed table plus two small hypernetworks: input_hyper realizes the working d_model embedding from (token seed, causal mean of previous 3 seeds); output_hyper materializes the V x d_model logit-projection table from the seed table at each forward. Storage drops 5.02x (4,194,304 -> 835,584 params). Motivated by Wittgenstein's late-period argument that meaning is use, not reference, and specifically by the beetle-in-the-box thought experiment (Philosophical Investigations §293) which argues that the contents of a private object that does no work in the language game can be replaced or removed without consequence — we apply that to the static embedding table. Built on PR #1855 (codemath3000, 1.06108 BPB merged 2026-04-27) with a 168-line surgical diff; XSA, LQER asymmetric int4, SparseAttnGate, BOS-fixed SmearGate, Polar-Express Muon, per-group lrzip compression, phased TTT, and the 9-hparam greedy stack are inherited verbatim. Three matched-budget ablation conditions pre-registered (A baseline, B redirect savings into 12th transformer layer, C smaller artifact at same architecture). Code-only non-record submission: 8xH100 SXM compute was unavailable on Runpod the deadline day; rather than ship without verification we ran a static analysis pass over the 3,800-line train_gpt.py and found+fixed three real integration bugs (TTT lm_head LoRA dimension mismatch, state-dict tensor duplication, GPTQ KeyError on tensors without registered Hessians). Six CPU sanity tests pass: shapes, parameter budget (5.02x), zero-init, causality, gradient flow. Empirical hypothesis remains open and reproducible in ~30 min on 8xH100 SXM following the README. Connection to prior art: Hypernetworks (Ha 2016), HashEmbeddings (Svenstrup 2017), Charformer/ByT5 (Tay/Xue 2021), intrinsic dimensionality of LM finetuning (Aghajanyan 2021), language modeling as compression (Deletang ICLR 2024).
hardware: 8xH100 80GB SXM (target — submission is code-only; compute unavailable at deadline)
claims: Storage: 5.02x fewer embedding-layer parameters than V x d_model static tied embedding at d_seed=64 (verified)
Causality: input embedding for token at position t depends only on tokens at positions {t} and {t-3, t-2, t-1} (verified by permutation test)
Compatibility: 168-line surgical diff against PR #1855; static-analysis-clean against the existing GPTQ + LQER + per-group lrzip pipeline modulo three found-and-fixed bugs
Empirical hypothesis (pending GPU): under matched 16 MB budget, redirecting the freed ~3.4M params into a 12th transformer layer equals or beats the 1.06108 baseline
technique_summary: PR #1855 base stack (XSA, LQER, SparseAttnGate, BOS-fixed SmearGate, PolarNS Muon, per-group lrzip, phased TTT) with one architectural change: tied V x d_model nn.Embedding replaced by UseTheoreticEmbedding (V x d_seed=64 + 2x 2-layer MLP hypernets, ctx_window=3). Activated by USE_THEORETIC_EMBED=1; switch off to recover the unmodified PR #1855 baseline.
philosophical_frame: Wittgenstein, Philosophical Investigations §§43, 65–67, 293, II.xi. The static V x d_model embedding is the technical incarnation of treating meaning as reference; on the use-theoretic view it should be computed contextually. The beetle-in-the-box (§293) is the sharper move: the contents of an embedding vector are accessed only through use, and could be replaced by anything that produces the same downstream behavior — which is exactly the property the hypernetwork exploits.
